prompt: A surreal minimal scene with several individuals standing alone on small isolated platforms in a vast empty space. Each person is facing and looking toward nearby groups of people standing on larger platforms. The groups are visibly denser and more crowded than the individuals observing them. From every perspective, each individual appears isolated while the people they observe belong to larger, more connected groups. No visible lines, no text, no symbols. Use body orientation and gaze direction to imply connections. Soft cinematic lighting, slightly asymmetrical layout, dreamlike but realistic, emotional and uncanny atmosphere.
visual_logic: Each individual observes denser groups than their own, making everyone appear less connected than those they perceive, creating a universal imbalance of perceived connections.
